name: Contra Costa Assessor Parcels
eda_questions: How many parcels are in San Ramon? Do geometries join cleanly to city boundaries? Are APNs stable enough as graph IDs?

name: Contra Costa Planning GIS Downloads
eda_questions: Does zoning cover incorporated San Ramon, or only unincorporated areas? Which layers are relevant: zoning, general plan, land use?

name: San Francisco Building Permits
eda_questions: How many residential permits are near candidate properties? Are permit records geocoded enough? Which permit types correlate with value/risk?

name: County Recorder or Assessor Sale Transactions
eda_questions: Can we get 50-200 permitted comparable sales? Do records include enough property characteristics? Can we backtest without MLS?
notes: This is the main unresolved source. Public context is enough; credible valuation needs comps.

name: Census ACS 5-year API
eda_questions: Which tract variables best explain value? Are tract-level values too coarse? How much lag matters?
notes: Use as slow-moving context, not point-in-time price signal.

name: TIGER/Line Geography
eda_questions: Can parcel points be assigned to tracts/block groups cleanly? What boundary level is best for each feature?

name: Census Cartographic County Boundaries
geography: United States; used here for California and Contra Costa County
eda_questions: Can we show Contra Costa County inside California and the Bay Area clearly? Does the generalized boundary work for a readable location snapshot?

name: 511 Bay Area Transit Data
eda_questions: Can we compute commute time to user-selected work locations? How close is nearest useful stop? Which routes matter?
notes: Requires 511 API token. Static GTFS is enough for MVP.

name: FEMA National Flood Hazard Layer
eda_questions: Which parcels intersect flood zones? Can we convert this into cost/risk language without overclaiming insurance cost?
notes: Verified live ArcGIS MapServer; layer includes Flood Hazard Zones.

name: CAL FIRE Fire Hazard Severity Zones
eda_questions: Which properties are in moderate/high/very high zones? How should this affect risk explanation?
notes: Important for hillside/suburban Bay Area properties.

name: OpenStreetMap Overpass API
eda_questions: Are POIs dense enough in target areas? Which amenities matter for value? How variable is tag quality?
notes: Use with ODbL attribution; corroborate important claims.

name: Geofabrik California OSM Extract
eda_questions: Should we process full extract or use Overpass queries? What features should be materialized locally?
notes: Verified current California PBF responds, but it is large.

name: California Public Schools and Districts
eda_questions: Can we map properties to nearby schools and districts? Which public metrics should become school quality signals?

name: NCES Common Core of Data
eda_questions: Does NCES provide enough location and school metadata? How does it compare to CDE freshness?

name: Urban Institute Education Data Portal
eda_questions: Which public school-performance variables are usable and explainable?
